item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 20min Australia's Royal Ascot team received a boost on Wednesday when it was announced the dua
item.description: Racing Post @RacingPost · 20min Australia's Royal Ascot team received a boost on Wednesday when it was announced the dual Group 1 winner Overpass would be making the trip to the iconic meeting racingpost.com Dual Group 1 winner to join stacked Australian sprinting team at Royal Ascot 2 3 1 mil

AK BETS @AKBets · 26min If anyone wants a picture with host of The Racing Room @ronangroome20 he’s working on the @AKBets corner pitch @LeopardstownRC today.
If you don’t know what he looks like he’s the fella dressed for Arctic conditions in 15 degree heat.
€5 ono. Cash Only.
#AKBets 4 9 1 mil

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 39min "I'm Harry Cobden's biggest fan but he rode Perceval Legallois like he was a no-hoper in
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 39min "I'm Harry Cobden's biggest fan but he rode Perceval Legallois like he was a no-hoper in the National"
Tom Segal Segal has his say on an eventful Grand National
Read with Racing Post+ De racingpost.com 1 1 4 3 mil
